パッケージ <Unnamed>

  • インタフェースのサマリー 
    インタフェース 説明
    Message
    Message interface
  • クラスのサマリー 
    クラス 説明
    CTConsensus
    This class implements Chandra-Toueg Consensus Algorithm [CT96] [CT96] T.
    DefaultMessage
    The default message type If you want to make an another message type, you can refer this code and make it in the same way.
    MeasureTime
    A class for measuring execution time.
    MessageQueue  
    Process
    An implementation of process entity.
    Simulator  
    TestAlgorithm
    The test algorithm Every process sends a message to the coordinator.
